title: dolichos heterophyllus
intro: Dolichos heterophyllus, also known as the Horse Gram or Kollu, is a leguminous plant native to India and other parts of Asia, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Dolichos heterophyllus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, manage diabetes, and aid in weight loss, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic medicine. Dolichos heterophyllus is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
